data.headline: Portfolio down 7.8 bps, underperforming SPY by 130 bps on single NVDA trade

Current holdings value is $74,113.65 against remaining cash position of $925,108.58. Single trade executed with no realized P&L. Process metrics show 1 citation check and full groundedness (1.0) with no risk engine rejects or injection quarantines.
